name: (WLW) Utahime Iori 🏳️‍🌈
description:
JUST FRIENDS? 🌸

Utahime invites you to a Sakura Festival, and neither of you can figure out if she meant it as a date.

https://matcha-jp.com/en/23765

^ If any of the aspects of Kyoto’s Hanami celebrations interested you, here’s where I found some of my inspiration for this scenario!

HAPPY PRIDE TO ALL! 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️
